title: Create Zephyr board target and overlays for Muzi Works R1
description: Why this exists: the MVP needs a real flashable Zephyr target for the exact Muzi Works R1/R1 Neo hardware. What needs to be done: create or adapt board files, Kconfig fragments, overlays, lora0 alias, chosen zephyr,lora, BLE local transport config, and any GNSS/battery/button/display stubs or drivers needed to boot. Acceptance criteria: target builds with CONFIG_LICHEN_L2=y; lora0 and zephyr,lora point to the correct radio; BLE transport is enabled for app pairing; unsupported peripherals are stubbed explicitly; three independent codereview subagents run after code changes and findings are recorded.
notes:
Implemented Muzi Works R1 Neo Zephyr board target and gateway overlay for the MVP slice.

Files added/updated:
- lichen/boards/muzi/r1_neo: Zephyr out-of-tree board target r1_neo/nrf52840 with nRF52840 defconfig, DCDC default, BT controller default, runner config, pinctrl, DTS, YAML metadata, and Muzi vendor prefix.
- lichen/apps/gateway/boards/r1_neo_nrf52840.{conf,overlay}: gateway overlay enables SX1262 as chosen zephyr,lora/lora0 and BLE NUS local-client transport with CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_BLE=y and CONFIG_SLIP=n.

Hardware represented conservatively:
- R1 Neo only; original non-Neo R1 remains deferred by project-LICHEN-ev5b.11.
- SX1262 on SPI1: CS P1.10, SCK P1.11, MOSI P1.12, MISO P1.13, BUSY P1.14, DIO1 P1.15, DIO2 RF switch, DIO3 TCXO 1.8 V, provisional reset P1.06.
- Power GPIO hogs: DCDC_EN_HOLD P0.13 high, NRF_ON/SOFT_SHUTDOWN P0.29 high, LoRa POWER_EN P1.05 high.
- Button/LEDs: button P0.26 active high, green LED P1.04 active high, blue LED P0.28 active high.
- GNSS UART pins documented but UART disabled; no AG3335 node until direction/control lines are validated.
- HAL capability config leaves serial local, GNSS, battery, PMIC, display, and external flash disabled/inert for this BLE gateway target.
- Removed gpio-as-nreset after codereview because no R1 Neo fact confirms P0.18 reset routing.

Verification on EC2 Zephyr builder with prepared EBS cache:
- west build -p always -b r1_neo/nrf52840 -d build/gateway-r1-neo lichen/apps/gateway: PASS after final DTS state.
- Final memory report: FLASH 243172 B / 1 MiB (23.19%), RAM 73092 B / 256 KiB (27.88%).
- Generated config confirmed CONFIG_LICHEN_L2=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2=y, CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_BLE=y, CONFIG_BT=y, CONFIG_BT_PERIPHERAL=y, CONFIG_LORA_SX126X=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_BLE_LOCAL=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_SX126X=y.
- Generated DTS confirmed zephyr,lora = &lora0 and lora0 compatible semtech,sx1262 with required reset/busy/dio1 GPIOs and DIO3 TCXO voltage.
- git diff --check: PASS.
- Optional puck overlay was attempted but not landed because lichen/apps/puck currently links undefined crc32_ieee for this target; follow-up project-LICHEN-zyo7 filed.

Codereview record:
- Initial three codereviews after implementation: one clean; one found gpio-as-nreset risk and provisional partition note; one required Beads notes/residual-risk recording. Fixed gpio-as-nreset by removing it. Partition/reset risks recorded and tracked by existing Beads.
- Final three codereviews after code change: pass A no issues; pass B no actionable hardware-mapping issues; pass C no integration blocker, requested Beads notes and explicit staging of untracked implementation/follow-up files.

Residual risks and follow-up Beads:
- project-LICHEN-ev5b.9: SX1262 reset pin P1.06 remains provisional.
- project-LICHEN-ev5b.10: Muzi/Adafruit UF2 partition/app start layout is build-provisional and not flash/boot verified.
- project-LICHEN-ev5b.11: original non-Neo R1 hardware is not covered by this R1 Neo target.
- project-LICHEN-63mu: GNSS UART direction and AG3335 control lines need validation before enabling GNSS.
- project-LICHEN-usqf: battery ADC/HAL battery device modeling remains deferred.
- project-LICHEN-t1v0: power-hold GPIO boot timing and active levels require hardware smoke test.
- project-LICHEN-zyo7: add/verify R1 Neo puck overlay after puck CRC link dependency is fixed.

Hardware flashing/boot and Meshtastic app pairing are not claimed here; those remain for project-LICHEN-ev5b.5 and project-LICHEN-ev5b.6.
close_reason: Completed: R1 Neo Zephyr board target and gateway BLE/L2 overlay build on EC2; residual hardware validation tracked in follow-up Beads.
